# Seasons Switcher

Let's build a **Seasons Switcher** by applying the concepts of HTML, CSS and JS.

### Refer to the below image.

<div>
  <img src="https://nkb-backend-media-static-tenxiitian.s3.ap-south-1.amazonaws.com/tenxiitian_prod/programs/Tech+Programs/frontend-content/ccbp/coding-practice-questions/dynamic-webapps/seasons-switcher-v1.gif" alt="seasons-switcher-v1">
</div>

### Instructions:

* The HTML img elements should have the ids `seasonSmallImage`, `seasonMediumImage`
### Warning
* Do not edit or remove the ids of the HTML `button` elements in the prefilled code.

#### By following the above instructions, achieve the given functionality.

* When the HTML `button` element with the season id is clicked, the season images in both the small and medium devices should change respectively.

### Note
* Try to achieve the design as close as possible.
* Apply the functionality to the given prefilled code.
